summary: Iteration 19 - Dashboard Smoke Test Complete. All features verified: Weather widget, KPI card clicks, Labor cost % fix (36.4% not 2327%), Input text visibility in light mode. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All KPI cards clickable and open correct panels.
critical_code_review_comments: Weather widget displays correctly with data-testid='dashboard-weather-widget' showing 75°F Partly Cloudy
Weather widget click opens weather-forecast panel via openPanel() CustomEvent
Revenue KPI ($777.15) click opens pos-connector panel - verified via console logs
Labor Cost KPI (36.4%) click opens schedule panel - bug fix verified (was 2327%, now realistic)
Events KPI (8 events) click opens echo-events panel
Inventory KPI ($2,606) click opens inventory panel
Forecast KPI (94.2%) click opens forecast-hub panel
All KPI cards have 'Click for details →' text as expected
Light mode input text visibility fix verified - color is rgb(29, 29, 31) = #1d1d1f (dark text on light background)
Global CSS has 8 light mode input rules ensuring text visibility
Backend /api/enterprise/command-center returns weather object with temp, description, icon
Backend labor.labor_pct is 36.4% (realistic, calculated from daily_labor / projected_daily_revenue)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing TEST_ prefixed events from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified all Dashboard smoke test items: 1) Weather widget with data-testid='dashboard-weather-widget' shows temp/description and opens weather-forecast panel on click, 2) All 5 clickable KPI cards (Revenue→pos-connector, Labor→schedule, Events→echo-events, Inventory→inventory, Forecast→forecast-hub) work correctly, 3) Labor cost % fixed from 2327% to 36.4% using daily_labor/projected_daily_revenue calculation, 4) Light mode input text visibility fixed via GLOBAL-STYLE.CSS rules (color: #1d1d1f). App is in light mode by default (theme-echo light). All 10 enterprise engines active.

frontend_tests.dashboard_loads: PASS - Enterprise Command Center loaded with data-testid='enterprise-command-center'
frontend_tests.weather_widget_visible: PASS - Shows 75°F Partly Cloudy with data-testid='dashboard-weather-widget'
frontend_tests.weather_widget_click: PASS - Opens weather-forecast panel (verified via console log)
frontend_tests.events_kpi_visible: PASS - Shows 8, Pipeline active, 'Click for details →'
frontend_tests.forecast_kpi_visible: PASS - Shows 94.2%, AI accuracy, 'Click for details →'
frontend_tests.input_text_visibility: PASS - Input color is rgb(29, 29, 31) = #1d1d1f (dark text visible)

mocked_apis_list: Weather data from weather_cache collection or default fallback

input_text_visibility.issue: Input text invisible in light mode
input_text_visibility.fix: Global CSS overrides in GLOBAL-STYLE.CSS lines 457-488
